title: Better Visuality
description: A small modpack aimed at optimizing and improving visual in Minecraft
body:
## Overview
A modpack aimed at optimizing and improving the visuals in Minecraft
![village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86ec5c146701a00f7f7d74c276a0cf86b4db9f13.png)
**In addition, management mods will improve your gameplay and make it easier.**
### Optimization
Excellent optimization. By Sodium + Iris
### Shaders?
**Download it** [here](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
